execution_recommendation.reason: Comprehensive release validation across 8 testing phases

tasks.title: Plugin Installation & Activation Validation
tasks.description: Validate plugin installation from ZIP, activation, and basic WordPress integration. Check for PHP errors and conflicts with Elementor.
acceptanceCriteria: Plugin ZIP can be uploaded via WordPress admin

tasks.title: Core API Endpoint Validation
tasks.description: Validate all core API endpoints return correct HTTP status codes and data structures.
acceptanceCriteria: GET / returns API version info (200 OK)

tasks.title: Five New Feature Domains Validation
tasks.description: Validate all five advanced feature domains: Media AI, Addon Ecosystem, Performance, Accessibility, and Snapshots.
acceptanceCriteria: Media AI: GET /media/search-stock returns stock images (200 OK)
Addon Ecosystem: GET /addons returns installed addons (200 OK)
Accessibility: GET /ally/scan/accessibility returns scan results (200 OK)
Snapshots: GET /snapshots returns snapshot list (200 OK)

tasks.title: Authentication & Elementor Compatibility Validation
tasks.description: Validate authentication fixes and Elementor compatibility. Ensure no 'Access denied' errors in debug log.
acceptanceCriteria: Elementor permission errors eliminated from debug log
Site settings can be updated via PUT /site/settings
Authentication with API key works for all endpoints

tasks.title: Plugin ZIP Structure & Naming Validation
tasks.description: Validate plugin ZIP structure, naming conventions, and version consistency.
acceptanceCriteria: Main plugin file is elementify.php (not elementify-mcp.php)

tasks.title: Documentation & Changelog Validation
tasks.description: Validate all documentation is updated including changelog, roadmap, and testing workflow.

tasks.title: ReleaseChain Integration Validation
tasks.description: Validate ReleaseChain integration with automated test scripts and workflow documentation.
acceptanceCriteria: validate-new-domains.sh script validates all five domains
All scripts are executable and properly documented

tasks.title: Final Release Artifacts Generation
tasks.description: Generate final release artifacts including checksum and release notes.
acceptanceCriteria: Release notes created summarizing five feature domains
Plugin ZIP size and structure verified
All validation tasks marked as passed
